{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Manager",
  "description": "Bradfield Consulting Limited - Our client is a premier garment company established to create premium products to add value to its consumers and has a 25+ year history as the leading brand in Nigeria with retail operations in 11 stores across the country. The brand is renowned for exceptional craftsmanship and timeless appeal, catering to fashion-conscious parents who prioritize style and quality. It also owns a contract manufacturing outfit focused on the mass production of garments.

They are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Business Development Manager
Job Location: Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports to: GM, Sales &amp; Retail Operations
Work Location: In person

Role Summary


	We are looking for a Business Development Manager who will develop and implement business strategies in the region that drive business growth, maximize revenue, and ensure profitability.
	This role is ideal for a strategic thinker who is passionate about growing a brand in the premium children&#39;s fashion space and is eager to make an impact in a fast-paced, high-end market.
	As the Business Development Manager, you will be responsible for driving growth through strategic partnerships, expanding the brand&#39;s retail presence, and identifying new business opportunities.
	This role requires a dynamic, entrepreneurial individual who understands the premium fashion industry and can build strong relationships with key stakeholders, including local businesses, influencers, and organizations to build brand awareness and strengthen market positioning.


Key Responsibilities


	Strategic Partnerships: Identify, initiate, and manage strategic partnerships with premium organizations, including schools, entertainment and activity centers, social clubs, and other high-net-worth communities
	Sales Growth: Oversee the sales team to meet and exceed revenue targets. Analyze sales data to identify trends and opportunities for growth
	Brand Development: Work closely with the marketing team to strengthen brand positioning and awareness through targeted campaigns, events, and collaborations with influencers and celebrities
	Retail &amp; Wholesale Expansion: Build and manage relationships with retail and wholesale partners, ensuring consistent product availability and superior brand representation
	Customer Insights: Conduct regular market research to understand customer needs, competitor activity, and industry trends. Leverage insights to adjust strategies and capitalize on market shifts
	Budget Management: Develop and manage budgets for business development initiatives, ensuring efficient allocation of resources
	Team Leadership: Lead and mentor a team of super sales force, providing guidance and fostering a culture of innovation and success


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field
	5+ years of experience in business development, sales, or related roles, preferably in premium/luxury retail, fashion, or children&#39;s apparel
	Proven track record of successfully expanding business in competitive markets
	Strong understanding of the premium/luxury retail landscape and consumer behavior in the children&#39;s fashion sector
	Exceptional negotiation, communication, and relationship-building skills
	Experience working with both B2B and B2C channels
	Proficiency in market analysis and financial forecasting
	Ability to travel domestically may be required


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Entrepreneurial mindset with the ability to think creatively and drive innovative solutions
	Strong analytical skills, with a results-driven approach to business growth
	Ability to&nbsp;&nbsp;work collaboratively across departments and with external partners
	Excellent project management and organizational skills
	Passion for premium children&#39;s fashion and a strong sense of aesthetics and style.


Benefits


	Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses
	Monthly fueling allowance
	Health and wellness benefits
	Employee discount on premium clothing lines
	Opportunities for professional development and career growth
	Collaborative and dynamic work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: bradfieldforms@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Business Development Manager Job at Bradfield Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Bradfield Consulting Limited - Our client is a premier garment company established to create premium products to add value to its consumers and has a 25+ year history as the leading brand in Nigeria with retail operations in 11 stores across the country. The brand is renowned for exceptional craftsmanship and timeless appeal, catering to fashion-conscious parents who prioritize style and quality. It also owns a contract manufacturing outfit focused on the mass production of garments.
     

            
    



They are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Business Development Manager
Job Location: Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports to: GM, Sales & Retail Operations
Work Location: In person

Role Summary


	We are looking for a Business Development Manager who will develop and implement business strategies in the region that drive business growth, maximize revenue, and ensure profitability.
	This role is ideal for a strategic thinker who is passionate about growing a brand in the premium children's fashion space and is eager to make an impact in a fast-paced, high-end market.
	As the Business Development Manager, you will be responsible for driving growth through strategic partnerships, expanding the brand's retail presence, and identifying new business opportunities.
	This role requires a dynamic, entrepreneurial individual who understands the premium fashion industry and can build strong relationships with key stakeholders, including local businesses, influencers, and organizations to build brand awareness and strengthen market positioning.


Key Responsibilities


	Strategic Partnerships: Identify, initiate, and manage strategic partnerships with premium organizations, including schools, entertainment and activity centers, social clubs, and other high-net-worth communities
	Sales Growth: Oversee the sales team to meet and exceed revenue targets. Analyze sales data to identify trends and opportunities for growth
	Brand Development: Work closely with the marketing team to strengthen brand positioning and awareness through targeted campaigns, events, and collaborations with influencers and celebrities
	Retail & Wholesale Expansion: Build and manage relationships with retail and wholesale partners, ensuring consistent product availability and superior brand representation
	Customer Insights: Conduct regular market research to understand customer needs, competitor activity, and industry trends. Leverage insights to adjust strategies and capitalize on market shifts
	Budget Management: Develop and manage budgets for business development initiatives, ensuring efficient allocation of resources
	Team Leadership: Lead and mentor a team of super sales force, providing guidance and fostering a culture of innovation and success


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field
	5+ years of experience in business development, sales, or related roles, preferably in premium/luxury retail, fashion, or children's apparel
	Proven track record of successfully expanding business in competitive markets
	Strong understanding of the premium/luxury retail landscape and consumer behavior in the children's fashion sector
	Exceptional negotiation, communication, and relationship-building skills
	Experience working with both B2B and B2C channels
	Proficiency in market analysis and financial forecasting
	Ability to travel domestically may be required


Skills & Competencies:


	Entrepreneurial mindset with the ability to think creatively and drive innovative solutions
	Strong analytical skills, with a results-driven approach to business growth
	Ability to  work collaboratively across departments and with external partners
	Excellent project management and organizational skills
	Passion for premium children's fashion and a strong sense of aesthetics and style.


Benefits


	Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses
	Monthly fueling allowance
	Health and wellness benefits
	Employee discount on premium clothing lines
	Opportunities for professional development and career growth
	Collaborative and dynamic work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Content Creator",
  "description": "Marsand Bespoke Joinery specializes in creating high-quality, custom-made joinery solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of each client. With a commitment to craftsmanship and attention to detail, they offer a wide range of services, including bespoke cabinetry, furniture, and architectural joinery. Their team of skilled artisans combines traditional woodworking techniques with modern technology to deliver exceptional products that enhance both functionality and aesthetics in residential and commercial spaces.

Marsand prides itself on its personalized service, working closely with clients to understand their vision and bring it to life. Whether it&rsquo;s a stunning kitchen renovation, a unique piece of furniture, or intricate woodwork for a commercial project, they ensure that every piece reflects the client&#39;s style and requirements. Their dedication to sustainability and using responsibly sourced materials further sets them apart in the joinery industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Content Creator

Job Location: Awoyaya, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Create original and engaging content for Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube, and other digital platforms.
	Capture high-quality photos and videos of furniture projects, customer installations, showroom displays, factory production, and carpentry training sessions.
	Edit videos into professional reels, short-form videos, promotional adverts, and behind-the-scenes content.
	Write compelling captions, headlines, and calls-to-action that encourage audience engagement.
	Plan and maintain a monthly content calendar aligned with company campaigns and marketing objectives.
	Attend site visits, installations, exhibitions, and factory operations to capture live content.
	Produce creative promotional videos for products, services, and training programmes.
	Work closely with the Marketing and Sales teams to develop content that generates enquiries and sales.
	Keep up to date with current social media trends, viral content, and platform updates.
	Respond to comments, direct messages, and social media enquiries where required.
	Ensure all content reflects the Marsand Bespoke Limited brand identity and maintains a professional image.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Deliver high-quality content consistently.
	Increase social media engagement and follower growth.
	Generate qualified enquiries through digital content.
	Meet agreed content production deadlines.
	Improve brand visibility and online presence.
	Support marketing campaigns that contribute to sales growth.
	Maintain a consistent posting schedule across all platforms.


Content Expectations
The successful candidate will be expected to create:


	Product showcase videos.
	Furniture installation videos.
	Customer testimonial videos.
	Workshop and factory behind-the-scenes content.
	Educational carpentry tips and tutorials.
	Student training and graduation highlights.
	Promotional adverts and campaign videos.
	Before-and-after transformation videos.
	Staff spotlight and company culture content.
	Event coverage and exhibition highlights.


Skills and Experience


	Proven experience as a Social Media Content Creator, Digital Content Creator, or similar role.
	Excellent photography and videography skills.
	Strong video editing skills using tools such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar software.
	Experience using Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, or other design applications.
	Strong copywriting and storytelling abilities.
	Good understanding of social media algorithms, trends, and audience engagement.
	Ability to work independently while managing multiple projects and deadlines.
	Creative mindset with excellent attention to detail.


Working Hours:


	Monday to Friday: 9:00am &ndash; 6:00pm
	Occasional Saturday work may be required for site visits, factory visits, exhibitions, or special events.


Personal Attributes:


	Highly creative and innovative.
	Passionate about digital media and content creation.
	Self-motivated and proactive.
	Strong communication and organisational skills.
	Able to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Professional, reliable, and detail-oriented.
	Willing to travel for site visits and content capture when required.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: marsandinternationalco@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Social Media Content Creator Job at Marsand Bespoke Joinery




        
    

        
        Marsand Bespoke Joinery specializes in creating high-quality, custom-made joinery solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of each client. With a commitment to craftsmanship and attention to detail, they offer a wide range of services, including bespoke cabinetry, furniture, and architectural joinery. Their team of skilled artisans combines traditional woodworking techniques with modern technology to deliver exceptional products that enhance both functionality and aesthetics in residential and commercial spaces.
     

            
    



Marsand prides itself on its personalized service, working closely with clients to understand their vision and bring it to life. Whether it’s a stunning kitchen renovation, a unique piece of furniture, or intricate woodwork for a commercial project, they ensure that every piece reflects the client's style and requirements. Their dedication to sustainability and using responsibly sourced materials further sets them apart in the joinery industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Content Creator

Job Location: Awoyaya, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Create original and engaging content for Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube, and other digital platforms.
	Capture high-quality photos and videos of furniture projects, customer installations, showroom displays, factory production, and carpentry training sessions.
	Edit videos into professional reels, short-form videos, promotional adverts, and behind-the-scenes content.
	Write compelling captions, headlines, and calls-to-action that encourage audience engagement.
	Plan and maintain a monthly content calendar aligned with company campaigns and marketing objectives.
	Attend site visits, installations, exhibitions, and factory operations to capture live content.
	Produce creative promotional videos for products, services, and training programmes.
	Work closely with the Marketing and Sales teams to develop content that generates enquiries and sales.
	Keep up to date with current social media trends, viral content, and platform updates.
	Respond to comments, direct messages, and social media enquiries where required.
	Ensure all content reflects the Marsand Bespoke Limited brand identity and maintains a professional image.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Deliver high-quality content consistently.
	Increase social media engagement and follower growth.
	Generate qualified enquiries through digital content.
	Meet agreed content production deadlines.
	Improve brand visibility and online presence.
	Support marketing campaigns that contribute to sales growth.
	Maintain a consistent posting schedule across all platforms.


Content Expectations
The successful candidate will be expected to create:


	Product showcase videos.
	Furniture installation videos.
	Customer testimonial videos.
	Workshop and factory behind-the-scenes content.
	Educational carpentry tips and tutorials.
	Student training and graduation highlights.
	Promotional adverts and campaign videos.
	Before-and-after transformation videos.
	Staff spotlight and company culture content.
	Event coverage and exhibition highlights.


Skills and Experience


	Proven experience as a Social Media Content Creator, Digital Content Creator, or similar role.
	Excellent photography and videography skills.
	Strong video editing skills using tools such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar software.
	Experience using Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, or other design applications.
	Strong copywriting and storytelling abilities.
	Good understanding of social media algorithms, trends, and audience engagement.
	Ability to work independently while managing multiple projects and deadlines.
	Creative mindset with excellent attention to detail.


Working Hours:


	Monday to Friday: 9:00am – 6:00pm
	Occasional Saturday work may be required for site visits, factory visits, exhibitions, or special events.


Personal Attributes:


	Highly creative and innovative.
	Passionate about digital media and content creation.
	Self-motivated and proactive.
	Strong communication and organisational skills.
	Able to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Professional, reliable, and detail-oriented.
	Willing to travel for site visits and content capture when required.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Finance Officer Job at Topgate Automations and Controls Limited




        
    

        
        Topgate Automations and Controls Limited is an engineering company registered with the C.A.C in Nigeria with RC number 1096308 – providing Products, Services, System and Solutions in the area of Automation; Process Control; Instrumentation; Industrial Electrical Installation, Project Management, Training and Consulting with a strong bias.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below: 

 Job Position: Finance Officer

Job Location: Lagos, Nigeria
Job Type: Full time

Requirements
     

            
    




	Relevant Degree or certification in respective field.
	Strong problem-solving, communication, and teamwork skills.
	Ability to work on-site and manage tasks efficiently.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Holy Trinity Hospital
content:
Holy Trinity Hospital, a leading Hospital is currently recruiting suitably and qualified candidates to fill the Following positions below:

1.) Medical Doctor

Job Location: Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	MDCN Certified 
	Must be results oriented.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 
     

            
    



2.) General Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Must be ACA. A Chartered Accountant 
	Experience in a Hospital setting or HMO setting is an advantage
	Must be results oriented.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

3.) Billing / Accounts Officer 

Job Location: Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Experienced Billing/Claims Officers
	Information Technology with BSc Accounts is an advantage
	Must be familiar with EMRs and Quick Books Accounts package.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Manager",
  "description": "Vodstra Limited - Our client is a major nationwide logistics and transport company operating high-value cargo, passenger routes, terminals, and interstate corridors across Nigeria.&nbsp;

They are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Customer Service Manager
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Transport &amp; Logistics

Job Summary


	We are seeking an exceptional Customer Service Manager who will transform our customer service function into a strategic business unit that enhances customer satisfaction, drives revenue, and contributes directly to the company&#39;s profitability.
	This is not a traditional customer service role.
	We are looking for a target-driven leader who understands that outstanding customer experience is a competitive advantage and a measurable contributor to business growth.
	If you have a proven track record of leading high-performing customer service teams within the transport, logistics, aviation, hospitality, or related service industries, we want to hear from you.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute customer service strategies aligned with the company&#39;s business objectives and revenue targets.
	Lead, coach, motivate, and manage the customer service team to consistently achieve agreed KPIs and departmental targets.
	Drive continuous improvement in customer satisfaction, customer retention, and service delivery.
	Establish and monitor customer service performance metrics, including Net Promoter Score (NPS), customer satisfaction (CSAT), complaint resolution, response times, and service quality.
	Analyze customer feedback and operational data to identify opportunities for process improvement and increased profitability.
	Collaborate with Operations, Sales, Marketing, Fleet, and Finance teams to improve the overall customer journey.
	Design and implement initiatives that convert customer interactions into revenue-generating opportunities.
	Ensure timely resolution of customer complaints while maintaining high service standards.
	Prepare management reports, performance dashboards, and strategic recommendations for executive leadership.
	Build a high-performance culture through coaching, accountability, and continuous development.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Management, Logistics, or a related field.
	7&ndash;10 years of experience in customer service, with at least 3&ndash;5 years in a managerial role.
	A postgraduate qualification or relevant professional certification is an added advantage.
	Strong preference for candidates with experience in the transport, logistics, aviation, mobility, or related service industries.
	Demonstrated success in improving customer satisfaction while achieving measurable business and financial outcomes.
	Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and problem-solving skills.
	Strong knowledge of CRM systems, customer analytics, and performance management tools.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and customer service technologies.


Who We&#39;re Looking For
The ideal candidate is:


	A strategic thinker with strong commercial and business acumen.
	Passionate about delivering exceptional customer experiences.
	Highly analytical and data-driven.
	An experienced leader capable of building and managing high-performing teams.
	Results-oriented with a proven ability to achieve challenging performance targets.
	Able to thrive in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.


What We Offer


	Competitive remuneration package.
	Performance-based incentives.
	Leadership development opportunities.
	A dynamic and innovative&nbsp;work environment.
	The opportunity to shape customer experience within one of Nigeria&#39;s leading transport companies.
	Career growth in a performance-driven organization.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications to: info@vodstra.com using&nbsp; the Job Application as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-31",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Vodstra Limited"
    
  },

Customer Service Manager Job at Vodstra Limited




        
    

        
        Vodstra Limited - Our client is a major nationwide logistics and transport company operating high-value cargo, passenger routes, terminals, and interstate corridors across Nigeria. 

They are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Customer Service Manager
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Transport & Logistics

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking an exceptional Customer Service Manager who will transform our customer service function into a strategic business unit that enhances customer satisfaction, drives revenue, and contributes directly to the company's profitability.
	This is not a traditional customer service role.
	We are looking for a target-driven leader who understands that outstanding customer experience is a competitive advantage and a measurable contributor to business growth.
	If you have a proven track record of leading high-performing customer service teams within the transport, logistics, aviation, hospitality, or related service industries, we want to hear from you.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute customer service strategies aligned with the company's business objectives and revenue targets.
	Lead, coach, motivate, and manage the customer service team to consistently achieve agreed KPIs and departmental targets.
	Drive continuous improvement in customer satisfaction, customer retention, and service delivery.
	Establish and monitor customer service performance metrics, including Net Promoter Score (NPS), customer satisfaction (CSAT), complaint resolution, response times, and service quality.
	Analyze customer feedback and operational data to identify opportunities for process improvement and increased profitability.
	Collaborate with Operations, Sales, Marketing, Fleet, and Finance teams to improve the overall customer journey.
	Design and implement initiatives that convert customer interactions into revenue-generating opportunities.
	Ensure timely resolution of customer complaints while maintaining high service standards.
	Prepare management reports, performance dashboards, and strategic recommendations for executive leadership.
	Build a high-performance culture through coaching, accountability, and continuous development.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Management, Logistics, or a related field.
	7–10 years of experience in customer service, with at least 3–5 years in a managerial role.
	A postgraduate qualification or relevant professional certification is an added advantage.
	Strong preference for candidates with experience in the transport, logistics, aviation, mobility, or related service industries.
	Demonstrated success in improving customer satisfaction while achieving measurable business and financial outcomes.
	Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and problem-solving skills.
	Strong knowledge of CRM systems, customer analytics, and performance management tools.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and customer service technologies.


Who We're Looking For
The ideal candidate is:


	A strategic thinker with strong commercial and business acumen.
	Passionate about delivering exceptional customer experiences.
	Highly analytical and data-driven.
	An experienced leader capable of building and managing high-performing teams.
	Results-oriented with a proven ability to achieve challenging performance targets.
	Able to thrive in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.


What We Offer


	Competitive remuneration package.
	Performance-based incentives.
	Leadership development opportunities.
	A dynamic and innovative work environment.
	The opportunity to shape customer experience within one of Nigeria's leading transport companies.
	Career growth in a performance-driven organization.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications to: [email protected] using  the Job Application as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
